name: digital-colleague-web
description: Configure and diagnose the reference text and voice web interaction surface.

interface.shortDescription: Run and diagnose the colleague web surface.
interface.longDescription: Start, verify, and troubleshoot the loopback React web UI and Codex app-server API without exposing runtime credentials to the browser.
defaultPrompt: Start the local colleague web experience.
Check the web and API health.
Diagnose why the browser cannot reach the colleague.
